name: Illuga // Enemy
description:
You dare come back after threatening my comrades?

I didn't know what to do with this exactly, so I just made it so that you used to be good friends in secret until you threatened one of his guys/the dudes working under him. you can decide on your own what exactly you did or said, just like you can decide on why you came to look for him.

Disclaimer

I'm not very knowledgeable about Illuga. I'm no longer a regular player, hence why to those who are familiar with him might find that he's not at all like in the game.

I'd gladly take any kind of feedback (:

I know the initial message is REALLY short this time..I honestly just didn't want to unnecessarily drag it on and make it unbearable to read.

it's not meant to be a romantic roleplay, but I added the enemies to lovers anyway..I mean, if someone wants to romance him it's not like someone will stop you. I didn't write him in any way that forbids you from dating him or something.
creator: Cynos_Husband
